case_title: SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES VS. CONSTANCE BOURGES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-25-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANNY SCHER, OWNER. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT CONSTANCE BOURGES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT GILES BOURGES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SPOUSE, CONSTANCE BOURGES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR PLAINTIFF CLAIM & DEFENDANT CLAIM. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAIVE RIGHT TO SERVICE ON EACH CLAIM. PARTIES ARE EXPECTED TO PROCEED FOR TRIAL AT THE OCTOBER 25TH HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) : THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.00 FILED BY SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE BOURGES, GILES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES DEFENDANT DID NOT CARRY HER BURDEN OF PROVING LANDLORD'S ALLEGED HARASSMENT, AND DOES NOT PREVAIL ON HER CROSS-CLAIM AGAINST PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) - FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE AS TO PLAINTIFF SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR (JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL BY CASH) BY DEFENDANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE BOURGES, GILES
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $202.29 RE 35712 FOR TRANSACTION W0419111D006 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES, DOC #1909694673, WARRANT #38205784, DATED MAR-25-2019
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BOURGES, CONSTANCE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE BOURGES, GILES $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.29 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $202.29, $125.00 FOR THE 12/17/14 CHARGE BACK, PLUS STATUTORY PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 1/17/2015. THE 7/9/14 INCIDENT IS OUTSIDE THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD. FOR THE ELEVATOR INCIDENT, THERE WAS CONFLICTING HEARSAY EVIDENCE ABOUT CAUSATION AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT PROVIDING THAT TENANTS WOULD PAY FOR DAMAGES EVEN WHEN NOT CAUSED BY TENANT NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT BOURGES, CONSTANCE BOURGES, GILES
